bookmarks.title: Harness design for long-running application development \ Anthropic
bookmarks.excerpt: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

bookmarks.title: 推理模型难以掌控思维链，但这反而是件好事 | OpenAI
bookmarks.note: 上下文越大，模型参数越强，就基本不会在 reasoning 时骗人
bookmarks.excerpt: OpenAI 推出 CoT-Control 评估套件，发现推理模型难以控制其思维链 (CoT)，这一结果证明了将思维链监测作为 AI 安全防护手段的可靠性。

bookmarks.title: Agent Skills as a Memory Layer | Acontext
bookmarks.excerpt: Skill memory for AI agents — learns from runs, writes Markdown skill files, and reuses them on the next run. Human-readable, portable, no embeddings.
